entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species being studied for race level diversity and genomic resources

entities.name: RACE POPULATIONS
entities.description: Groups of sorghum that exhibit significant genetic and morphological variation due to evolutionary divergence

entities.name: K-MER-BASED SEQUENCE COMPARISON
entities.description: A method used to identify conserved k-mers and race-specific genetic signatures across sorghum accessions

entities.name: CONSERVED K-MERS
entities.description: Genetic sequences found to be conserved across all 272 sorghum accessions

entities.name: RACE-SPECIFIC GENETIC SIGNATURES
entities.description: Genetic markers used to identify gene variability in sorghum races

entities.name: PAVS
entities.description: Presence-Absence Variations identified in 10,321 genes

entities.name: RACE STRUCTURE
entities.description: The genetic organization and distribution of sorghum races

entities.name: DIVERSITY
entities.description: The genetic and morphological variation within the sorghum species

entities.name: DOMESTICATION
entities.description: The process of adapting sorghum for agricultural use, linked to specific selection signatures

entities.name: DEEP LEARNING-BASED VARIANT CALLING
entities.description: A computational approach used to analyze genotypic data for identifying variants

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: 1.7 million high-quality genome-wide single nucleotide polymorphisms identified in sorghum

entities.name: SELECTIVE SIGNATURE REGIONS
entities.description: Genomic regions showing evidence of positive or negative selection

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE SCAN
entities.description: A method used to identify selective signature regions across the genome

entities.name: IHS
entities.description: Integrated Haplotype Score, a statistical method used for genome-wide scans of selection

entities.name: XP-EHH
entities.description: Cross-population Extended Haplotype Homozygosity, a statistical method used for genome-wide scans of selection

entities.name: SELECTIVE SWEEP REGIONS
entities.description: 179 regions distributed over 10 chromosomes associated with selection signatures

entities.name: QTLS
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci that co-localize with selective sweep regions

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: An important agronomic trait related to the domestication of sorghum

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: An important agronomic trait related to the domestication of sorghum

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: Agricultural programs that can be assisted by k-mer signatures, traits, and SNP markers
